title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 407.915 - Civil action for all claims against principal may be joined — express or contract waivers of commission laws, invalid
text:
407.915.  Civil action for all claims against principal may be joined — express or contract waivers of commission laws, invalid. — 1.  Nothing in sections 407.911 to 407.915 shall invalidate or restrict any other or additional right or remedy available to a sales representative from seeking to recover in one action on all claims against a principal.
  2.  A provision in any contract between a sales representative and a principal purporting to waive any provision of sections 407.911 to 407.915, whether by expressed waiver or by a contract subject to the laws of another state, shall be void.
(L. 1989 S.B. 192 § 1 subsecs. 7, 8)
